预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2228, the slight tightening of enrollment in 2026 (29 students compared to 30, a decrease of 1) which slightly intensifies competition, the total number of Physics Category candidates remaining basically unchanged, and the stable reputation of the school. Its Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, and stable attention for applications. 预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 321 in 2025, the intensifying effect of a slight enrollment contraction in 2026 (13 students vs. 14, a decrease of 1), the total number of History Category examinees in Liaoning Province remaining roughly flat, the stable reputation of the university, and its top-tier disciplinary strength.
